improvements.change: When implementing release-validation tasks, explicitly require linking workflow run URLs and production verification evidence in the PR so review can validate non-code acceptance criteria.
Require pushing commits before invoking the Code Review Agent to ensure the review runs on the latest PR diff.

State expected output filenames for production sign-off and agent activity logs (for example results/production_deployment_signoff_<ISSUE>.md and results/agent-activity-<ISSUE>.log) to keep release tasks consistent.
